issue.title: www.sparkchess.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://www.sparkchess.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.sparkchess.com%2F) ### Comment > Adguard fails to block ads. There's a floating ad below and ad banners on the side, which AdGuard fails to block. To make things worse, note the greyed-out square on the chessboard. User can't move any pieces to that grayed-out square. Somehow, it only happens when AdGuard is on. ### Screenshots

AdGuard Base filter

**Other:**

issue.title: hochi.news

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.title: www.sparkchess.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://www.sparkchess.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.sparkchess.com%2F) ### Comment > Adguard fails to block ads. There's a floating ad below and ad banners on the side, which AdGuard fails to block. To make things worse, note the greyed-out square on the chessboard. User can't move any pieces to that grayed-out square. Somehow, it only happens when AdGuard is on. ### Screenshots

AdGuard Base filter

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://www.sparkchess.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.sparkchess.com%2F) ### Comment > Adguard fails to block ads. There's a floating ad below and ad banners on the side, which AdGuard fails to block. To make things worse, note the greyed-out square on the chessboard. User can't move any pieces to that grayed-out square. Somehow, it only happens when AdGuard is on. ### Screenshots

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.title: www.scribd.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Social Widget
labels.description: Social widgets, share, like buttons and popups

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

Other ad blocker ### AdGuard version N/A ### What type of problem have you encountered? issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard DNS

### AdGuard version

AdGuard DNS - public resolver (no client version applicable)

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

the problem is with app, not a site

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://ads.applovin.com/

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

_No response_

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

AdGuard DNS filter

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

1. Writing as the domain owner. The `||applovin.com^` entry in AdGuard Mobile Ads filter (filter 11) and AdGuard DNS filter (filter 15) is a wildcard that blocks every applovin.com subdomain. Seven of those are public-facing B2B surfaces, not consumer ad-serving endpoints:

- applovin.com and www.applovin.com: corporate marketing site
- ads.applovin.com: Ads Manager web UI, used by advertisers to manage their own campaigns
- max.applovin.com: MAX management UI for publishers
- dash.applovin.com: AppLovin dashboard
- api.ads.applovin.com: API backend for the Ads Manager UI
- support.applovin.com: support documentation

The "ads" prefix on the manager UI is the heuristic trigger, but the endpoint is a B2B management tool.

Would you consider removing the `||applovin.com^` entry from those filters? Happy to provide additional context if useful.

Contact:
Erol Keskiner
Operations, AppLovin
devops@applovin.com


### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

issue.title: bilibili.com - History API tracking circumvention for logged-in users
issue.body:
## Problem

Bilibili.com re-injects stripped tracking parameters back into URLs via the History API for logged-in users. After the `$removeparam` rules (already in TrackParamFilter) strip `vd_source`, `trackid`, and `spm_id_from` from URLs on page load, Bilibili's JavaScript uses `history.pushState` and `history.replaceState` to add these parameters back, bypassing URL-level filtering.

## Affected parameters

- `vd_source`
- `trackid`
- `spm_id_from`

## Proposed fix

Use `trusted-replace-argument` scriptlets to intercept `history.pushState` and `history.replaceState` calls and strip these three parameters from the URL argument before the call executes.

```
bilibili.com#%#//scriptlet('trusted-replace-argument', 'history.pushState', '2', 'repl:/([?&])vd_source=[^&#]*&|[?&]vd_source=[^&#]*(?=#|$)/$1/')
bilibili.com#%#//scriptlet('trusted-replace-argument', 'history.replaceState', '2', 'repl:/([?&])vd_source=[^&#]*&|[?&]vd_source=[^&#]*(?=#|$)/$1/')
bilibili.com#%#//scriptlet('trusted-replace-argument', 'history.pushState', '2', 'repl:/([?&])trackid=[^&#]*&|[?&]trackid=[^&#]*(?=#|$)/$1/')
bilibili.com#%#//scriptlet('trusted-replace-argument', 'history.replaceState', '2', 'repl:/([?&])trackid=[^&#]*&|[?&]trackid=[^&#]*(?=#|$)/$1/')
bilibili.com#%#//scriptlet('trusted-replace-argument', 'history.pushState', '2', 'repl:/([?&])spm_id_from=[^&#]*&|[?&]spm_id_from=[^&#]*(?=#|$)/$1/')
bilibili.com#%#//scriptlet('trusted-replace-argument', 'history.replaceState', '2', 'repl:/([?&])spm_id_from=[^&#]*&|[?&]spm_id_from=[^&#]*(?=#|$)/$1/')
```

## Steps to reproduce

1. Log in to bilibili.com
2. Navigate to any video page with tracking parameters in the URL (e.g., `?vd_source=xxx`)
3. Observe that after page load, the tracking parameters are re-added to the URL via History API

## Environment

- AdGuard Browser Extension / AdGuard for Windows/Mac/Android
- Logged-in bilibili.com user

comment.body:
@AlanJie  Hi
I don't have an account and cannot check it well.
I see you capture `&` in group, it seems parameters may be glued together without a separator after applying.
What about something like that?

```adblock
bilibili.com#%#//scriptlet('trusted-replace-argument', 'history.pushState', '2', 'repl:/([?&])(vd_source|trackid|spm_id_from)=[^&#]*&/$1/')
bilibili.com#%#//scriptlet('trusted-replace-argument', 'history.pushState', '2', 'repl:/[?&](vd_source|trackid|spm_id_from)=[^&#]*(?=#|$)//')

bilibili.com#%#//scriptlet('trusted-replace-argument', 'history.replaceState', '2', 'repl:/([?&])(vd_source|trackid|spm_id_from)=[^&#]*&/$1/')
bilibili.com#%#//scriptlet('trusted-replace-argument', 'history.replaceState', '2', 'repl:/[?&](vd_source|trackid|spm_id_from)=[^&#]*(?=#|$)//')
```
